doc_title: From Role-Play to Drama-Interaction: An LLM Solution

rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited in the paper, covering a range of topics including AI role-play, interactive narrative, and AI-generated art.
Discusses the limitations of the current drama LLMs, including limited modalities, action complexity, and evaluation methods. Highlights areas for future research and development.
Explains the Sparse Instruction Tuning (SIT) method for training drama LLMs. Breaks down complex instructions into sub-tasks and uses annotations to improve instruction followin...
Reviews related work on role-play LLMs, interactive narrative intelligence, and AI for art. Highlights the basis for drama LLMs and the potential for immersive experiences.
